text.title: QA Test Strategy Template — Output Contract
text.summary: A filled `qa-test-strategy-template.md` (or equivalent artefact) committed to the repository / knowledge space, following the fixed section list and carrying header metadata (version, owner, last_reviewed).

list.item: section list matches the QA Test Strategy Template canonical schema
each section either filled or explicitly marked `not_applicable: <reason>`
evidence links populated for any claim or recommendation
decisions / actions block at the end (≥ 1 next-action)

antipattern.reason: Templates without anchors decay into opinion.
Reviewers cannot tell skipped from forgotten.

list.item: All canonical sections present (filled or marked not_applicable).
Each claim has an evidence link.
Final block lists explicit next-actions with owners.
Artefact is committed to the agreed path.
